blocks.label: war_stress_timing_development
blocks.allowed_use: 144-cell development screen plus the preregistered war_stress_gsa_overlay_v1 Morris/QMC diagnostics; connected-region selection remains governed by the parent atlas

blocks.label: war_stress_timing_validation
blocks.allowed_use: prospective validation of one development-frozen connected component only

blocks.label: war_stress_observable_validation
blocks.allowed_use: classical observable controller validation only after the restricted privileged ceiling validates

forbidden_reuse: Paper 2 confirmatory claim before the classical observable gate
any risk mask, amplitude or offset not frozen in war_stress_timing_atlas_v1
pre_access_requirements: exact GSA Morris/QMC overlay manifest committed
finite comparator and timing-template manifest committed
watcher readiness verified before producer start
exact policy-family reduction or optimization certificate committed
